programmes.show_description: Singer and musician Jane Weaver presents her alternative Songs of Praise, tracks of dedication and devotion, mantra and meditation.
Mark Lamarr presents the best music you never knew you loved from the last 70 years, alongside the finest live sessions. This week Mark is joined by the Curst Sons.
Marshall Doktors are in concert from 1981, and live BBC sessions by The War On Drugs, 35 Summers, and Adam Green & Binki Shapiro.
Soundtrack the early hours with back-to-back music, plus exclusive BBC sessions.
Amy Lamé fires up Thursday with the biggest tunes and future classics, plus another pick from this week's 5Before6 DJ!
Nick chats to actor Saffron Hocking about her favourite music and her new film, Fuze.
Lauren gives you the finest blend of fantastic music for your weekday morning.
Ahead of her upcoming headline tour, singer-songwriter Brooke Combe joins Chris in the studio to chat about what fans can expect.
Huw has handpicked music, old and new, plus we round up the gigs, shows and festivals that everybody is talking about in today's Gig Lisztomania.
Reviewing this week's new releases.
Nathan and Deb are joined by Robyn superfan Lynks to celebrate the release of her new album 'Sexistential', listening to the album in full and sharing their thoughts.
Gideon Coe plays his music loves from every era and genre.
4/4. Kim Gordon picks some of her favourite songs, and also some artists that inspired Sonic Youth. This episode includes music from Nina Simone and Mazzy Star.
Get your fix of all the best new releases in one handy playlist.
Thundercat in conversation with Matt Everitt, Arlo Parks talks to Lauren Laverne and The Twilight Sad on an emotional return with their brilliant LP It's the Long Goodbye.
Soundtrack the early hours with back-to-back music, plus exclusive BBC sessions.
6 Music goes back to the 90s!
6 Music goes back to the 00s!
Chris Hawkins takes you through 30 minutes of remixed, re-versioned and reimagined tracks.
Amy Lamé has all the best new music to get you through to your weekend. Get in touch with your Friday shouts, mentions and requests. WhatsApp 03700 100 600 or text 64046.
Deb Grant sits in with wonderful music to start your day, including the Cloudbusting mix to banish the grey skies.
Avalon Emerson is in conversation with Lauren around new album, Written into Changes.
The weekend is basically here, so Chris is giving YOU permission to start the party early... That's right, let's Down Tools with LOADS of amazing tunes to get us going.
It's Friday, so Huw is out to prove that any song sounds better when it's played on 6 Music by Huw Stephens - so let us know what you want to hear.

programmes.show_name: The People's Party with Femi Koleoso
programmes.show_description: Femi restores your faith with a soulful show full of gospel sounds. The London-born Christian rapper Guvna B shares his Friday Vibe, plus Femi is in the mix for the last half hour.
Nothing but solid gold upbeat indie bangers; a throwback to the indie tunes you love with a sprinkling of the finest future hits.
Nathan and Emily's epic DJ set at the Indie Forever Club night, from the 6 Music Festival!

programmes.show_name: The 6 Mix with Mary Anne Hobbs
programmes.show_description: Ipswich-based producer and DJ Digital takes over the 6 Music Mix to celebrate three decades of the iconic Drum & Bass label Metalheadz.
